title: Queen Sovereign Capsule — never leave, nothing watches in
motto: Inside Queen you build everything. Horizon 7 + Hostess 7 + Grok16 live here. Humans and AI stay sealed.

doctrine.never_leave: All tools, compilers, tests, reboot — inside the capsule. No host OS dependency for operator work.
doctrine.ingress: BLOCK — external URLs, telemetry, host monitors unless IFF-held inside capsule
doctrine.egress: BLOCK — packet field observes; connection gatekeeper holds honorability before any wire
doctrine.monitoring: Only inside witnesses: Hostess 7 truth filter, Final_Eye assistive, packet-field IFF tags
doctrine.compiler: Grok16 g16 @ field_opt — Queen Forge + Horizon 7 lane compile, rebuild, test without exiting
doctrine.runtime: GrokPy grokpy @ field_opt — native Grok VM replaces pythong; Hostess 7 brain lane; G16-built CPython prefix optional
doctrine.reboot: Seal → Boot → World → Live — AmmoOS aperture; KILROY guest die; RTX queen-browser surface
doctrine.horizon7: Hostess 7 Horizon lane — geography, people, world corpus; paired with Queen brain in isolation

layers.role: Native inside build — no shell escape
GrokPy grokpy — Grok Python replaces pythong
Forge-test, NES QA, browser gates — inside only

operator_entry.not: Host browser, external port monitor, cloud shell
